## Fast and durable
Being water-based, Q² Tire Express is extremely easy to apply and allows for both dry and wet application. It spreads on the surface very well with just one wipe and doesn't require rubbing into the surface like GYEON's SiO2-infused Q² Tire Coating.

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-tire-express_5802e045-a734-4cf5-9ff4-0d1c5d2c5603.jpg?v=1702424036&width=1080)

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-tire-express-1.jpg?v=1702424035&width=1080)

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-tire-express-banner.jpg?v=1702424036&width=2400)

Mature Satin finish
Q²M Tire Express provides a very deep, natural, and matte visual effect. It builds a repellent, self-cleaning layer that helps to keep the tire clean and will not diminish even during a long drive in rainy conditions.

[

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-tire-applicator_534d8a54-7efc-4a74-9d3f-664f12c3e3de.jpg?v=1702424036&width=1080)

](https://carzilla.ca/products/gyeon-q-m-tire-applicators)

## Tire Applicator
Comes in two sizes, small for low profile tires and large for truck tires.

[
Shop GYEON Applicators
](https://carzilla.ca/products/gyeon-q-m-tire-applicators)
[

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-tire-cleaner_f90dc682-7e8c-4f66-bbea-87462ea84aec.jpg?v=1702401932&width=1080)

](https://carzilla.ca/products/gyeon-qm-tire-cleaner-500ml)

## Removes tire browning
The cleaner the surface, the better the coating will bond.

[
Shop GYEON Tire Cleaner
](https://carzilla.ca/products/gyeon-qm-tire-cleaner-500ml)
[

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-tire-coating_3fe15b11-9500-4ae7-9ee7-b785c4bd50a2.jpg?v=1702424035&width=1080)

](https://carzilla.ca/collections/brand-gyeon/products/q2-tire-sio2-coating-400ml)

## SiO2 Tire Coating
Want something more durable? Try GYEON's SiO2 Tire Coating.

[
Shop GYEON Tire Coating
](https://carzilla.ca/collections/brand-gyeon/products/q2-tire-sio2-coating-400ml)

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-tire-express-banner2.jpg?v=1702424036&width=2400)

Tire Conditioner
Conditions and shines your tires at the same time; the conditioning ability will keep your tires supple and prevent them from cracking or splitting prematurely.
There is no easier way to refresh the look of your vehicle tires. With a simple and straightforward application, Q²M TireExpress is the perfect daily tire dressing. 
**TIP:** To get the most out of the product, use it on a damp tire right after the wash. Spread it evenly and let it dry. A subtle, factory-fresh look will be the result.
**Scroll down for detailer reviews and FAQs.**

Description

## GYEON Tire Express

### Superb maintenance products for outstanding detailing performance

[![image](https://cdn.shopify.com/s/files/1/0013/8903/5555/files/download-gyeon-brochure_480x480.jpg?v=1666391207)](https://cdn.shopify.com/s/files/1/0013/8903/5555/files/GYEON__02_Leaflet_DetailingWash_Maintenance_2021_WEB.pdf?v=1666391021)

Q²M Tire Express is the ultimate daily tyre & rubber dressing offering fantastic looks matched with a simple, straightforward application. It will restore the “factory fresh” look of the tyre and keep it for many a hundred miles.

### BEST PRACTICE AND PRO-TIPS FROM YVES HEYLEN

There is no easier way to to refresh the look of your vehicle tyres. With a simple and straight forward application, Q²M TireExpress is the perfect daily tyre dressing. TIP: To get the most out of the product, use it on a damp tire right after the wash. Spread it evenly and let dry. A subtle, factory fresh look will be the result.

CONSUMPTION: 10-15ml/ set

DURABILITY: >2 washes

### MATTE LOOK

Q²M Tire Express provides a very deep, natural and matte visual effect. It builds a repellent, self cleaning layer that helps to keep the tyre clean and will not diminish even during a long drive in rainy conditions.

### QUICK & EASY DAILY TYRE DRESSING

Being water based, it’s extremely easy to apply and allows both a dry and wet application. It spreads on the surface very well with just one wipe and doesn’t require rubbing into the surface like our SiO2 infused Q² Tire.

Application

It's as simple as wipe and done. It can be applied to both wet and dry tires. Ensure optimal surface preparation with the use of Q²M TireCleaner.

Is it shiny, satin or matte?

GYEON Tire Express will produce a satin finish but can be further buffed down to matte. It will also dull down over time to a deep matte finish.

What's the difference between Tire and Tire Express?

Tire Express is water-based and can be applied while the tires are still wet. It's meant to be used as a 'fast dressing' and does not require preparation as thorough as GYEON Tire. Tire Express can also be used on other rubber surfaces, such as weather seals, to restore and protect them.

Will it sling?

No, it will not sling. The reason why something will sling is if too much product is applied without buffing it down. Also, ensure there are no products in the tire treads; make sure those are cleaned up as well.

How long does it last?

Up to a month or so.

What's the layering time?

About 15~30 minutes.
